name: Cocoa Bars
recipeInstructions:
1. For the crust, cream together butter and powdered sugar until smooth.
2. Add flour and milk; mix until a dough forms.
3. Spread evenly in an ungreased 9-inch square pan.
4. Bake at 350°F (175°C) for 10 to 12 minutes or until lightly browned.
5. For the topping, beat eggs slightly.
6. Combine dry ingredients (flour, sugar, baking powder, salt, vanilla, almond extract) and add to the beaten eggs.
7. Fold in chopped almonds or pecans.
8. Spread over the hot baked crust.
9. Return to oven and bake for 20 minutes longer.
10. Allow to cool; cut into 24 bars.

From the C and H Sugar Kitchen
